name: project-bootstrap
description: Full-stack project bootstrapper: discovery interviews in Cowork produce specs, then Claude Code deploys a complete workflow engine with task database (Python CLI), phase gates, quality gates, agent delegation, correction protocol, coherence system, falsification protocol, loopback tracking (S1-S4), gotcha generation, progressive disclosure refs/, consolidated pre-edit hooks, and 30+ infrastructure files — covering all 33 development framework systems at 100%.
